creator: csg@waterspout.com
text:
rdist 6.1.5 is now available under a free license.  We should
consider upgrading the version distributed with FreeBSD.  While
rdist 6.1.5 has several new features/enhancements, it does
break compatability with the previos rdist's protocol.

Fix: 

I've put a tarball on my website that's close to ready for import:

   http://www.physics.purdue.edu/~csg/rdist-freebsd.tar.gz
